site.name: Titus Njiru
site.title: Titus Njiru | Systems Development Consultant
site.description: Systems Development Consultant building reliable web, mobile, and data products for teams and organizations.

hero.headline: Practical software for teams that need clarity, speed, and reliability.
hero.body: I help organizations design and build web platforms, mobile products, data tools, and operational systems that are easy to use and easier to maintain.

about.headline: Experienced across product, engineering, and implementation.
about.body: I work with teams to turn operational needs into stable digital products. My background spans full-stack development, data science, mobile apps, and design, which helps me bridge strategy and delivery without losing sight of the user.
workParagraphs: I focus on clear requirements, sensible architecture, and interfaces that make everyday tasks faster. The goal is software that remains understandable after launch.
My consulting work often includes product scoping, system design, implementation, integrations, performance tuning, and mentoring internal teams.
about.skillsHeadline: A practical toolkit for building and shipping.

projectsSection.headline: Projects with clear outcomes and maintainable foundations.
projectsSection.body: A sample of systems, apps, and dashboards across product categories. The emphasis is on practical workflows, readable interfaces, and reliable delivery.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-stack commerce platform with authentication, payments, inventory management, and an admin workspace.

projects.title: Task Management App
projects.description: A collaborative task system for teams with realtime updates, structured workflows, and shared project visibility.

projects.title: Mobile Fitness App
projects.description: A cross-platform app for workout plans, progress tracking, and member engagement.

projects.title: Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: A business intelligence dashboard with forecasting, visual reports, and practical operating metrics.

projects.title: Real Estate Platform
projects.description: A property listing platform with search, virtual tours, and finance tools for buyers.

projects.title: Blockchain Voting System
projects.description: A secure voting prototype focused on transparency, auditability, and immutable records.

contact.headline: Let's talk through the system you want to build.
contact.body: Send a short brief, ask about availability, or reach out directly. I respond best to clear goals, constraints, and timelines.

footer.summary: Systems Development Consultant building useful, maintainable software for teams and organizations.
